title: Manufacturing Engineer - Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd!
